name: Vanishing Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Beat margarine and sugars until creamy. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well. Combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt; add to margarine mixture, mixing well. Stir in oats and raisins; mix well. Drop by rounded tablespoonsful onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until light golden brown. Cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheet; remove to a wire rack. Cool completely. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
VARIATIONS: Stir in 1 cup chopped nuts. Substitute 1 cup semisweet chocolate morsels or candy-coated chocolate pieces (M&Ms) for raisins; omit cinnamon. Substitute 1 cup diced, dried, mixed fruit for raisins.
